message:
feat(packs): register monitoring.datadog, fix clippy lints

- Register monitoring.datadog pack in PACK_ENTRIES array
- Add datadog.rs pack implementation
- Add nginx.rs pack implementation (was missing)
- Fix raw string hashes in heredoc.rs (clippy::needless_raw_string_hashes)
- Fix push_str to push for single chars (clippy::single_char_add_str)
- Fix format string inlining (clippy::uninlined_format_args)
- Fix evaluator test wildcard_allowlist_matches_only_within_pack
- Add repro tests for context depth and tokenizer edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
